---
name: "[EN] I have an idea"
about: Provide an inspiration to Astratch.
title: "[Feat] Describe your idea in one sentence [e.g., Add Y at X]."
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

## Pre-submission Checklist
- [ ] I have confirmed that this idea has not been implemented yet
- [ ] I have confirmed that this idea is beneficial
- [ ] I am submitting this idea because I encountered an obstacle while working on a project
- [ ] This idea will not cause disruption

## What is my idea
State your idea here. If it is an obstacle encountered during your usage, please also describe that obstacle.

## What I want it to look like (optional)
You can attach your design here, whether in text, images, or video.
